scripts.build: npm run build -w @beautybook/database && npm run build -w @beautybook/api && npm run build -w @beautybook/website
scripts.typecheck: cd apps/api && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../website && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.postinstall: npx --yes prisma@5.22.0 generate --schema=packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma && npx --yes -p typescript@5.6.3 tsc -p packages/database/tsconfig.json
